name: ssh-remote-workbench
description: Work on a remote codebase through SSHFS, patch mounted files, and run remote commands over SSH.

interface.shortDescription: Mount a remote codebase with SSHFS, edit files locally, and run commands remotely.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for an SSHFS-first remote development workflow: mount the remote tree locally, edit mounted files, apply patch-style changes, and execute remote commands over SSH while keeping local and remote paths aligned.
defaultPrompt: Mount a remote directory from an SSH host into the current local folder.
Run a remote command for the code mounted in the current local folder.
Map the current mounted directory to the remote cwd and inspect that environment.
